title: AccountStatusTypeValues
description: Specifies the current state of an account. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Enabled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account can be used for its intended purpose.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Disabled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account cannot be used for its intended purpose, either temporarily or permanently.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deleted
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account cannot be used any longer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ProForma
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is temporary and can be partially used for its intended purpose. The account will be fully available for use when the account servicer has received all relevant documents.
